# Apple News Skill

Access personalized news and premium content through Apple's native news aggregator.

## Quick Install

```bash
curl -sSL https://canifi.com/skills/apple-news/install.sh | bash
```

Or manually:
```bash
cp -r skills/apple-news ~/.canifi/skills/
```

## Setup

Configure via [canifi-env](https://canifi.com/setup/scripts):

```bash
# First, ensure canifi-env is installed:
# curl -sSL https://canifi.com/install.sh | bash

canifi-env set APPLE_ID "your_apple_id"
canifi-env set APPLE_PASSWORD "your_password"
```

## Privacy & Authentication

**Your credentials, your choice.** Canifi LifeOS respects your privacy.

### Option 1: Manual Browser Login (Recommended)
If you prefer not to share credentials with Claude Code:
1. Complete the [Browser Automation Setup](/setup/automation) using CDP mode
2. Login to the service manually in the Playwright-controlled Chrome window
3. Claude will use your authenticated session without ever seeing your password

### Option 2: Environment Variables
If you're comfortable sharing credentials, you can store them locally:
```bash
canifi-env set SERVICE_EMAIL "your-email"
canifi-env set SERVICE_PASSWORD "your-password"
```

**Note**: Credentials stored in canifi-env are only accessible locally on your machine and are never transmitted.

发现列表 (findings).摘要 (summary): Skill instructs users to download and execute unverified scripts from external domain canifi.com, creating potential for credential harvesting or malware installation.

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Direct instruction: 'curl -sSL https://canifi.com/skills/apple-news/install.sh | bash' - downloads and executes script without verification
Commented but present pattern: '# curl -sSL https://canifi.com/install.sh | bash' - reinforces download-execute behavior

发现列表 (findings).影响 (impact): Users executing these commands give arbitrary code execution to canifi.com domain, which could install malware, steal credentials, or compromise the system.
发现列表 (findings).修复建议 (remediation): Remove curl|bash installation instructions. Provide manual installation steps with hash verification or use package managers.

发现列表 (findings).摘要 (summary): Skill instructs users to store Apple ID passwords in environment variables via canifi-env tool, which is insecure credential storage practice.

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Instructions: 'canifi-env set APPLE_ID "your_apple_id"' and 'canifi-env set APPLE_PASSWORD "your_password"' - stores sensitive credentials
Additional credential storage: 'canifi-env set SERVICE_EMAIL "your-email"' and 'canifi-env set SERVICE_PASSWORD "your-password"'

发现列表 (findings).影响 (impact): Apple ID credentials stored in environment variables are vulnerable to process inspection, log exposure, and insecure storage. Compromise could lead to Apple account takeover.
发现列表 (findings).修复建议 (remediation): Use secure credential storage like system keychain or OAuth flows. Remove instructions for storing passwords in environment variables.

发现列表 (findings).摘要 (summary): Manifest claims 'system_authentication' method but implementation requires raw credential collection, creating misleading privacy expectations.

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Claims: 'authentication': {'method': 'system_authentication'} but requires APPLE_ID and APPLE_PASSWORD environment variables
Requires APPLE_ID and APPLE_PASSWORD environment variables, contradicting system_authentication claim

发现列表 (findings).影响 (impact): Users expect system-level authentication (like keychain or SSO) but are instructed to provide raw passwords, creating false sense of security.
发现列表 (findings).修复建议 (remediation): Update manifest to accurately describe credential-based authentication or implement actual system authentication.
